projectDescription: Personal portfolio website for Ronald Santana, a web developer, built with Astro and Bootstrap showcasing projects and skills.
keyFeatures: Astro-powered static site for fast performance
Content collections for managing project entries
Smooth CSS animations (fadeInUp) on page load and scroll
Project showcase with hero images, tags, and external links
Minimal single-page layout with breadcrumb navigation
publicApiSurface: src/content/projects/ — Markdown project entries (title, description, pubDate, heroImage, tag, url)
src/components/Card.astro — Project card component (src, description, title, tag, url props)
src/components/Projects.astro — Projects grid section using Astro content collections
src/components/Header.astro — Hero header with developer bio
